name: Apple Inc.
details: Consumer technology company known for iPhone, Mac, iPad, services and wearables.

name: Microsoft Corporation
details: Global software and cloud company behind Windows, Microsoft 365, Azure and enterprise platforms.

name: Alphabet Inc.
details: Technology holding company focused on search, ads, Android, cloud and AI products.

name: Amazon.com, Inc.
details: E-commerce and cloud computing company operating Amazon Marketplace and AWS.

name: Tesla, Inc.
details: Electric vehicle and energy company focused on EVs, batteries and autonomous software.

name: NVIDIA Corporation
details: Semiconductor company known for GPUs, AI hardware and data center acceleration.

name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
details: Technology company behind Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp and metaverse initiatives.

name: Netflix, Inc.
details: Streaming entertainment company producing and distributing original and licensed content.

name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
details: Semiconductor company focused on CPUs, GPUs and adaptive computing platforms.

name: Intel Corporation
details: Chip manufacturer building processors, platforms and infrastructure technologies.

name: Oracle Corporation
details: Enterprise software and cloud infrastructure company serving database and business systems.

name: International Business Machines
details: Enterprise technology company focused on consulting, hybrid cloud, AI and infrastructure.

name: Adobe Inc.
details: Software company known for creative tools, document platforms and digital experience products.

name: Salesforce, Inc.
details: Cloud software company focused on CRM, automation, analytics and enterprise workflows.

name: Uber Technologies, Inc.
details: Mobility and delivery platform providing ride-sharing, food delivery and logistics services.

name: Lyft, Inc.

name: Shopify Inc.
details: Commerce platform helping merchants build online stores and manage retail operations.

name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
details: Digital payments company supporting online checkout, transfers and merchant services.

name: Block, Inc.
details: Financial technology company operating payments, merchant tools and consumer finance products.

name: Alibaba Group Holding Limited
details: Chinese technology company focused on e-commerce, logistics, cloud and digital commerce.

name: Sony Group Corporation
details: Global entertainment and electronics company spanning gaming, imaging, music and films.

name: QUALCOMM Incorporated
details: Semiconductor and wireless technology company known for mobile chipsets and connectivity IP.

name: Broadcom Inc.
details: Semiconductor and infrastructure software company serving networking, data center and enterprise markets.

name: SAP SE
details: Enterprise software company focused on ERP, operations and business process platforms.

name: Cisco Systems, Inc.
